creator: andrew+ports@fubar.geek.nz
text:
On Wed, 1 Nov 2006 22:27:19 +0100
Philip Paeps <philip@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> On 2006-10-31 21:51:14 (+0000), Andrew Turner
> <andrew+ports@fubar.geek.nz> wrote:
> > Update the devel/lua50-posix port to support both lua 5.0 and 5.1.
> 
> The 5.0 bits of this seem to work, but the new lua-posix port (5.1)
> does not like to compile here (-CURRENT):

Attached is a patch to fix the build problem. The lua-posix-2.patch is
a replacement for the previous patch. The attached extrapatch-* files
are to be placed in the devel/lua-posix/files dir. The contents of
devel/lua50-posix/files can be removed.

Andrew
